title: Bolsheviktion 2: Yurovsky's Revenge
description:
StoryRussia, 1920. Two years after the carnage you caused the communist regime in Bolsheviktion 3D, your marriage to the princess has produced a beautiful baby boy. Although the country is in chaos, with a bitter war between the Whites and the Reds, your life with your new family at Alexander Palace is peaceful.

But something evil is stirring in the Red heartlands.

One stormy night, you awaken to your son’s screams. You find a ransom note, some blood and a missing child.

You grab your pistol from the closet and give chase.

Your son needs you. The Whites are rising.

Features• Supercharged Retro Raycasting Engine — built from the ground up in pure C. John Carmack’s classic raycasting, massively upgraded with real height variation, multi-level texture-mapped floors & ceilings, dynamic lighting, colour grading, skyboxes, animated textures and objects - all in software mode. Feels like 1993… but better.

• Four epic acts. 16 Levels. 4 Secret Levels. From the comforts of Alexander Palace, to the dark blood-stained tunnels of the gulags, to the industrial heartland of post-revolutionary Russia – hunt your son’s captors with no mercy, and kill any Bolshevik that gets in your way

• Expanded Enemy roster. Nine unique enemy types and four brutal Bolshevik bosses to slay

• Three new weapons. Bolsheviktion 3D's original Wolf3D inspired four return, along with the C96 pistol, a double barreled shotgun and a flamethrower to roast some Bolsheviks

• Four difficulty modes. Three primary - Give Me a Go, Dad, Don't Be So Tough and Let's Go Boys! — easy, medium, hard. Think you’re a pro? BOLSHEVIKTOR! mode awaits, and it’s not even remotely fair.

• Rubles & Collectibles — Loot Bolshevik treasure and recover your son’s missing toys. Spend your earnt rubles on growing a library of forbidden Anti-Bolshevik books that grant powerful in-game perks

• Smarter, Meaner Secrets — Wolfenstein pushwalls are old news. Fake walls, hidden switches, rising & lowering platforms and pressure plates, among others, keeps you guessing

• Looking and sounding good. Brand new custom graphics, art, music and sound effects. Original compositions by nationalist musicians Cybernazi and Cherep Audio. Original front cover artwork by TST Artworks
description_short: Whites in chaos. A kidnapped royal son. One man to save the Empire. In this explosive sequel to Bolsheviktion 3D, journey across war-torn Russia in hot pursuit of your son's kidnappers, killing as many Bolsheviks as you can along the way. A software rendered boomer shooter - the old fashioned way.
